name: cincy-soccer-root
description: Root project for Cincinnati Soccer Scraper and Website

scripts.setup: npm install && cd cincy-soccer-scraper && npm install && cd ../cincy-soccer-website && npm install
scripts.scrape: cd cincy-soccer-scraper && node scrape.js && node harvest.js && node clean.js
scripts.deploy: npx wrangler pages deploy cincy-soccer-website/dist --project-name cincinnati-soccer --commit-dirty=true
scripts.publish-all: npm run scrape && npm run build && npm run deploy
